/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared  -o ../../plugin_output_directory/component_pfs_example_component_population.so CMakeFiles/component_pfs_example_component_population.dir/pfs_example_component_population.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_pfs_example_component_population.dir/pfs_example_continent.cc.o CMakeFiles/component_pfs_example_component_population.dir/pfs_example_country.cc.o
